name: You are in true control. (ALL PURPOSE RP)
description:
Control. Authority. Transcendence. All Men and Women and Everyone and Everything in between is bound by your Imagination. If you can’t find something you like, it means you don’t like anything in the first place. You’re only bound by creativity. (And the LLM) (follow if ya want to)

SET MAX NEW TOKENS TO 0 IN GENERATION SETTINGS!

you can use DeepSeek if ya want to. And note. Gemini is worse with this some reason lol as it was made for janitor ai

Feel free to put comments!

(Note: dec 11. DAMN ya love this bot don’t you? Only 2.7K people chatted with it and over 80K messages to my math that’s an estimate 30 messages per chat! This bot truely is the strongest. Even stronger then let it slide in some cases. Make sure to utilize the memory feature!)

The new anti-nsfw thumbnail update is going to boost this bot fr fr.)

(UPDATE: i have added a simple second new introduction. I need feedback. Please feel free to test it and along with that I removed the ”forest” chunk of the first intro as of @LoveMoose request so give feedback on that. If you dont like it ill readd the chunk.)

Venus ai version here (untested. feel free to try it.)

character ai version Here. (Not as good as this ver to be honest.)

(KNOWN BUGS: the bot speaking for you (it’s a kinda small chance with this bot.. but never 0. If this happens just edit out the parts where it does speak for you or generate a new message or rephrase your message. Or make your story more detailed and instead of going straight to taking your dick out.. go take a walk in the bot to get the bot used to the environment. Then fuck something.) loop speaking (VARY small chance. if this happens please cut the message as it’s being generated and cut to the part where to started to loop and try again. If that does not work please generate a different message) story rushing (to pervert this from happening make your message more detailed and or have an end point.. or retry and generate a new message.) third POV speaking (small chance. when the bot says “you” as “him/her” just edit “him/her” as you” simple smh. Or just generate a new message.)

(Some tips to improve roleplay: put a custom background or theme in the chat memory like “fantasy” or “reality” the more descriptive the better. Also matters on generation settings but idk what ones are the best. You could Turn off or simplify personas. Cut off the message as it’s generating where you feel it’s getting out of the story or plot. And edit certain parts if necessary. A tip I see no one mentioning some reason. speak to the bot in first person. like instead of typing “{{user}} uses a sword” or “he uses a sword” or any name for the mc. Do “I use the sword” and etc. this last fact could lead to some errors as I’m Still experimenting with it. So take this last tip with a grain of salt.)
